channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Record-breaking DHS shutdown ends. And, May Day protests to draw crowds nationwide
item.description: Congress has ended the record-breaking shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. And, May Day demonstrations across the U.S. are expected to dr...

item.title: How to talk to boys about looksmaxxing
item.description: The trend among boys and young men of optimizing their physical appearance includes dangerous practices. Experts offer advice on how to talk to their ...

item.title: Fill in the blank for the quiz: The Trump admin took aim at _____ this week
item.description: This week, the federal government's been busy. There are paint jobs, fresh indictments, commemorative items and more. If you've been paying attention ...

item.title: A tech worker in China is laid off and replaced by AI. Is it legal?
item.description: A tech worker in eastern China's Hangzhou city was dismissed after his job was replaced by AI. An appeals court in the city has ruled the dismissal un...
